summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Iteration 53 - Advisor Operating System Features. All 28 backend tests passed (100%). New features include Portfolio Monitoring Engine, Client Financial Graph, Tax Optimization Engine, and Automated Portfolio Rebalancing. The Advisor Intelligence Dashboard is the new daily landing page combining all alerts and insights.

minor.issue: Had float('inf') serialization error - FIXED by converting to None

critical_code_review_comments: Portfolio Monitoring Engine provides daily scanning with alerts for allocation drift, concentration risk, idle cash, tax-loss opportunities, and retirement shortfall
Client Financial Graph maps entire client financial life including family, entities, assets, insurance, liabilities, and cash flow
Tax Optimization Engine calculates super contribution benefits, tax-loss harvesting, dividend imputation, and negative gearing
Rebalancing Engine provides tax-aware trade recommendations with CGT calculations
Advisor Intelligence Dashboard combines all alerts into a single daily landing page
All new routers properly included in server.py with /api prefix
Fixed float('inf') JSON serialization issue in tax-rates endpoint
seed_data_creation: None - used existing mock data in portfolio_monitoring.py, financial_graph.py, tax_optimization.py, rebalancing.py
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new Advisor Operating System features working correctly. Key APIs tested: /api/monitoring/daily-scan, /api/monitoring/book-insights, /api/monitoring/alerts/summary, /api/financial-graph/client/{client_id}, /api/financial-graph/client/{client_id}/cash-flow, /api/financial-graph/client/{client_id}/insurance-analysis, /api/tax-optimization/client/{client_id}/analysis, /api/tax-optimization/client/{client_id}/strategies, /api/tax-optimization/client/{client_id}/eofy-checklist, /api/rebalance/preview/{client_id}, /api/rebalance/drift-report/{client_id}, /api/rebalance/optimal-trades/{client_id}. Existing Command Center, Intelligence, Client Portal endpoints continue to work. Disclaimer modal shows on each page load (expected behavior).
